project.description: An orchestration layer for AI coding assistants (currently Claude Code) that enforces consistency, reliability, and more predictable outputs through 7 production bundles with skills, agents, and commands for Java, JavaScript, documentation, and plugin development.

default.responsibility: Root Python project providing the build infrastructure (pyprojectx + uv) and test harness for all marketplace bundles. Contains 146 source files across bundles and 116 test files.
default.responsibility_reasoning: source: derived-data — root path, python build_system, pyproject.toml descriptor
default.purpose_reasoning: Root project with pyproject.toml managing build for all sub-bundles

test.description: Python pytest test suites organized by bundle for script and integration testing
